text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Kikuka Sho, and the paddock is
extremely lively.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower has undergone a major
transformation over the course of just one
summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While there is concern that the long distance will
be difficult for her... Mihono Bourbon is still the
favorite to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Matikanetannhauser is very excited
for the race, even if there aren't many eyes on
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho, the race to decide the strongest
Umamusume, begins!
